Perfect Strangers

Perfetti sconosciuti

"Everyone has three lives: A public life. A private life... and a secret life."

7.9
2016MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

During a dinner, a group of friends decide to share whatever message or phone call they will receive during the evening, with unforeseen consequences.

Tags

friendshipjealousyhusband wife relationshipitalianitalytruthconfidencehonestylovelove affairtrustgamechildhood friendslove fiction
